local_dishes.name: Vegetarian Haggis, Neeps & Tatties
local_dishes.description: A vegetarian version of Scotland's national dish, made with lentils, oats, onions, and spices. Served with mashed turnips (neeps) and potatoes (tatties)

local_dishes.name: Cullen Skink (Vegetarian Version)
local_dishes.description: Traditionally a smoked fish soup, but many restaurants offer a vegetarian take using potatoes, leeks, onions, and cream

local_dishes.name: Scottish Mash Bowls
local_dishes.description: Creamy mashed potatoes topped with vegetarian gravies, mushrooms, or root vegetables

local_dishes.name: Macaroni Pie (Veg)
local_dishes.description: A Scottish bakery classic: cheesy macaroni baked inside shortcrust pastry

local_dishes.name: Cheese & Onion Pie
local_dishes.description: Shortcrust or puff pastry filled with cheese, onions, and herbs. Found in bakeries and cafés

local_dishes.name: Lentil Soup
local_dishes.description: Thick, warming soup made with red lentils and vegetables. A Scottish staple and very filling

local_dishes.name: Leek & Potato Soup
local_dishes.description: Smooth, creamy, and mild in flavour — great for kids

local_dishes.name: Cranachan
local_dishes.description: A classic Scottish dessert made with whipped cream, oats, honey, and raspberries

local_dishes.name: Sticky Toffee Pudding
local_dishes.description: A rich sponge cake made with dates and served with hot toffee sauce. A winter favourite

local_dishes.name: Shortbread
local_dishes.description: Buttery Scottish biscuits, perfect for snacking or souvenirs

local_dishes.name: Haggis with Neeps & Tatties
local_dishes.description: Scotland's national dish — minced offal with spices, served with mashed turnips (neeps) and potatoes (tatties)
source_files: England and Scotland/Edlyn All Inclusive Guide- London and Edinburgh.pdf

local_dishes.name: Cullen Skink
local_dishes.description: A creamy Scottish soup made of smoked haddock, potatoes, and onions
source_files: England and Scotland/Edlyn All Inclusive Guide- London and Edinburgh.pdf

local_dishes.name: Scottish Tablet
local_dishes.description: A sweet, crumbly fudge made with sugar, condensed milk, and butter
source_files: England and Scotland/Edlyn All Inclusive Guide- London and Edinburgh.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Scotland is generally safe, but watch belongings in busy areas like Royal Mile
safety_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use well-lit paths when walking after dark
safety_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid swimming in lochs unless guided — water temps remain cold even in summer
safety_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Three UK - Best for data-heavy usage and coverage across Highlands
connectivity_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: O2 and EE - Reliable urban and rural reach
connectivity_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Vodafone - Strong in cities, patchier in remote Skye areas
connectivity_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: SIM cards available at Edinburgh Waverley Station, airports, or local Carphone Warehouse
connectivity_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: 4G widely available in cities, intermittent on Isle of Skye and remote Highland routes
connectivity_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

transport_options._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

health_tips.tip: No special vaccines required for Scotland
health_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

health_tips.tip: Make sure Tetanus, Hepatitis A, and Typhoid vaccinations are up-to-date
health_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

health_tips.tip: Carry mosquito repellent for countryside areas
health_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf

health_tips.tip: Water is safe to drink - refills are fine in tap water or mountain springs unless posted otherwise
health_tips._source_file: England and Scotland/All Inclusive Guide - Scotland - Smriti.pdf
